_publications._publicationTitle: Forward genetic screen for malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor formation identifies new genes and pathways driving tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Additionally, FOXR2 loss inhibited the ability of STS26T cells to form tumors in xenograft experiments compared to HRPT knockout controls
details: FOXR2 loss inhibited the ability of STS26T cells to form tumors in xenograft experiments compared to HRPT knockout controls
